meaning: n.将子公司股票分配给母公司股东,续集
examples: The film is a spinoff from the TV series "Sabrina The Teenage Witch."
The spinoff is expected to be effective June 30.
The show is a spinoff of the British show Pop Idol.
They went forward with a spinoff of Eastman Chemical that was planned by his predecessor, Kay Whitmore.
Most of the spinoff talk has centered on forming a REIT for the accommodations business.
